<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? -->

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. -->

<!-- What alternatives have you considered? Why is this approach better? -->

<!-- Any technical notes about how this might be implemented. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues (open and closed)
- [ ] This feature cannot be achieved with existing Pulse features
- [ ] I understand this may take time to implement or may not be accepted
